question: Based on the stacked bar chart of quarterly platform engagement indicators, which statement about overall performance is most appropriate?

options.A: Q1 has the best overall performance because it appears to have fewer support tickets than the other quarters.
options.B: The chart cannot be used to judge overall performance because it stacks indicators with different units that cannot be meaningfully combined.
options.C: Q4 clearly has the best overall performance because its bars are the most evenly balanced across all indicators.
options.D: Q2 has the best overall performance because it has the highest total stacked height.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Page Views, Server Uptime, etc.) into a single total. These metrics have different units and meanings (e.g., counts, temperatures, consumption), so adding them together creates a meaningless sum. The stacked height cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric comparisons are valid.
